content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "OR in Matrix". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/486/B
constraints: Each element in the matrix is either 0 or 1
content.inputFormat: The first line contains two integers n and m, the number of rows and columns in the matrix. The next n lines contain m binary digits each, representing the matrix.
content.outputFormat: The output should be a single integer, the maximum number of 1s in a submatrix.
